title: Package 1 — AI Integration Sprint
target: Best for founders who already have a product and want to add AI capabilities — chatbots, document search, automated workflows, LLM-powered features.
included: API layer connecting AI to your existing system

title: Package 2 — SaaS MVP Build
target: Best for founders who have a validated idea and need a senior engineer to build the full product — backend, frontend, auth, database, and cloud deployment.

title: Package 3 — Monthly Technical Retainer
target: Best for product teams who need a reliable senior developer on call — for new feature development, architecture decisions, code reviews, or ongoing AI feature rollout.
